examples: So, what did your toxicologist say?
At age 11, Ana shows persistent, growing brain lesions, the toxicologist reported.
WHO has provided chelating agents, and the clinical toxicologist has started training local medical staff.
"There are 80, 000 chemicals in commerce, " says California Environmental Protection Agency toxicologist Stephen Dizio.
